rationale: The citing paper references Berger and Schwartz (2011) once in its prior-research overview as an example of a behavioral driver result (interesting products generate more immediate but not sustained eWOM). The citation appears in a grouped literature summary and is not used to build the paper's core agglomeration hypotheses, model specification, or empirical design. The paper's main theoretical foundation is agglomeration theory, so this reference serves as background context rather than a direct building block.
